results.rendered_html:
upā-√nI P. Ā. -nayati, -te, to convey or bring or lead near,  MBh. ;  BhP. ;  R.  &c.;
to draw near,  MBh. iii ;  BhP. viii ;
to lead away or off, carry off,  R. ;  BhP. ;
to lead near, introduce to;
to imitate,  MBh. v, 1339.
